initialize(address,address).details: Called once by the factory right after deployment.

burn(address).notice: Burn LP shares held by this contract and return underlying tokens.

mint(address).notice: Mint LP shares. Caller must have already transferred both tokens in.

swap(uint256,uint256,address).notice: Low-level swap. Router computes amounts; here we enforce the invariant.
